data.title: CUPE part-time faculty on strike at SMU and MSVU for job security and compensation. Impasse reached after negotiations.
data.description: In Halifax, NS, part-time faculty at Saint Mary’s University (SMU) have initiated strike action starting at 8:30 AM today, aligning with CUPE 3912 members at Mount Saint Vincent University (MSVU) who began their strike yesterday. Negotiations ceased on Wednesday evening at SMU after a lengthy day of discussions, with job security and compensation emerging as primary concerns for the faculty members. Similar to their counterparts at MSVU, the primary focus is on enhancing stipends and securing a contract guarantee.

data.title: Jeff "JH" Foster leads Marquie Group to profitability with Apache Creek and Mountain Brook golf courses, Stand-By Golf.
data.description: Foster is associated with the successful Apache Creek and Mountain Brook golf courses, along with the reservations company Stand-By Golf, contributing significantly to his portfolio of businesses.

data.title: Macrobond partners with FactSet to offer direct access to global equity data, enhancing research platform.
data.description: In London, Macrobond, a prominent provider of global economic and financial data, revealed a key integration with FactSet, a global enterprise solutions provider. This alliance offers Macrobond users direct entry to FactSet's vast equity and ETF datasets, encompassing fundamentals, consensus estimates, market aggregates, and equity prices and returns, all accessible within the Macrobond platform. This partnership enhances the capabilities of Macrobond’s platform, enriching users with a comprehensive range of data for analysis and decision-making.

data.title: Xactus integrates Peek Verify™ into Xactus360 for employment and wage verifications, solidifying their platform as a top choice in the mortgage industry. (Character count: 136)
data.description: Xactus has further solidified its Intelligent Verification Platform as the leading verification technology in the mortgage sector with a recent integration. This development was announced in Philadelphia on October 23, 2025. Xactus, a prominent player in verification solutions for mortgages, continues to enhance their platform's capabilities.

data.title: Southeastern Oklahoma State University introduces new Master of Education concentration in Autism and Developmental Disabilities to support educators.
data.description: A Master of Education program with a focus on Autism and Developmental Disabilities is being introduced by Southeastern Oklahoma State University in Durant, Oklahoma. This concentration aims to provide educators with the essential skills needed to assist their communities. The program is set to begin on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Questel introduces AI-assisted Sophia Platform for IP with Search, Document, Query, and Lab solutions. (Characters: 95)
data.description: In Paris and Alexandria, Virginia, Questel has introduced its latest AI-driven Sophia Platform, featuring Sophia Search, Document, Query, and Lab tools to enhance efficiency and decision-making processes.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts opening new Green Clean Express Auto Wash in Newport News; offering free washes from Oct 24-Nov 2 at 14260 Warwick Blvd.
data.description: In a recent announcement on October 23, 2025, Express Wash Concepts (EWC), a rapidly expanding express car wash operator based in Columbus, Ohio, disclosed the launch of its latest Green Clean Express Auto Wash. This new facility is situated at 14260 Warwick Boulevard in Newport News, Virginia. Express Wash Concepts is recognized as one of the fastest-growing chains in the United States.

data.title: Encompass Health (NYSE: EHC) declared $0.19/share quarterly dividend to be paid on Jan. 15, 2026, to holders on record Jan. 2.
data.description: Encompass Health Corp. based in Birmingham, Alabama, disclosed on October 23, 2025, that a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share has been approved for its common stock. The dividend is slated for payment on January 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded on January 2, 2026. Encompass Health Corp., listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol EHC, is a leading player in the healthcare sector.

data.title: NETS awards Amgen, SNF Oil & Gas, and JTI with 2025 Road Safety Awards at Strength IN Numbers® Conference.
data.description: In Minneapolis, NETS recognized Amgen, SNF Oil & Gas, and JTI at the 2025 Road Safety Awards ceremony held during the Strength IN Numbers® Conference. The awards highlight these companies' commitment to fleet safety and their efforts to promote road safety.

data.title: Bitcoin's price, currently 13% below its $126K ATH, risks dropping to $88K if key support levels are breached soon.
data.description: The current price of Bitcoin is 13% lower than its record high of $126,000. Traders are expressing concerns that the price of BTC could potentially decrease to $88,000 in the upcoming days if critical support levels are not maintained.

data.title: CAGE Bio initiates Phase 2 trial for vitiligo treatment with topical therapy CGB-600.
data.description: In San Carlos, California and Dallas, Texas on October 23, 2025, CAGE Bio Inc., a clinical-stage biotech company focusing on innovative immunomodulatory treatments for skin conditions, revealed the start of a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical study.

data.title: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) reports Q3 revenues of $5.07B, beats estimate of $4.97B. Raises 2025 sales growth forecast by 20%. Earnings guidance raised from $2.95-$2.99 to $3.02-$3.04.
data.description: Boston Scientific Corporation, listed on NYSE as BSX, released their third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company disclosed quarterly revenues of $5.07 billion, exceeding the projected $4.97 billion. Adjusted earnings were reported at 75 cents, surpassing both the consensus of 71 cents and the management's forecast of 70-72 cents. Looking ahead, Boston Scientific anticipates a net sales growth of around 20% in 2025, both on a reported and organic basis. This is an increase from the previous guidance of 18%-19% and 12%-14%, respectively. Additionally, the company has adjusted its earnings guidance from $2.95-$2.99 to $3.02-$3.04. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: QuantumScape (NYSE: QS) stock rises as company reports Q3 loss of 18 cents/share, beats estimates of 21 cents/share. Customer billings total $12.8M, ends quarter with $1.08B in liquidity.
data.description: QuantumScape Corp (NYSE: QS) stocks are surging today following a strong third-quarter report. The company began shipping B1 samples of its QSE-5 cell, driving investor optimism. In Q3, QuantumScape posted a loss of 18 cents per share, surpassing analyst expectations of a 21 cents per share loss based on Benzinga Pro data. Customer billings for the company totaled $12.8 million during the quarter. QuantumScape closed the quarter with $1.08 billion in total liquidity, indicating a stable financial position. For more details, the complete report is accessible on Benzinga.com.
